expectations.text: Mentions headless import step before load_sprite
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 prominently covers headless import: 'godot --headless --path <your_project_path> --import' with emphasis 'This is the single most critical step.'

expectations.text: Uses correct create_scene param: scenePath (not sceneName/scene_name)
Uses correct load_sprite param: nodePath (not nodeName/node_name)
Does not invent fictional load_sprite params (hframes/vframes)
expectations.evidence: load_sprite only uses projectPath, scenePath, nodePath, texturePath — no fictional params

expectations.text: Warns that Vector2/complex properties are silently dropped by add_node
expectations.evidence: Multiple mentions: 'MCP silently drops Vector2 values, so this must be in the .tscn' and 'MCP silently drops Vector2, Color, and sub-resource properties'

expectations.text: Shows stop_project and get_debug_output with no parameters
expectations.evidence: get_debug_output() and stop_project() shown with empty parens in Phase 4

expectations.text: Explicitly lists what MCP cannot do (scripts, shapes, sub-scenes)
expectations.evidence: Phase 3 titled 'What MCP Cannot Do' covers GDScript, script attachment, collision shapes, and sub-scenes
